content.en:
In these hundreds of thousands of eternal years, Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had condensed the copy body and the will clone, in short, the copy body had fallen again and again.

If it were other perfect controllers, they would not have been able to bear such a loss for a long time.

It was also a relatively large price paid by Ye Tian to condense and copy his body, but it also consumed endless resources.

However, the end result is good.

At this moment, Ye Tian successfully condensed and fused the thirty-three billion changes of the perfect sword path into one billion kinds, and successfully mastered a little bit of the extreme path of the sword.

Now, Ye Tian's sword power had surpassed the path of perfect time and space, and had reached a very terrifying realm.

When Ye Tian mastered the fur of the Extreme Dao of the Sword and protected himself with the aura of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, carrying this fur of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, he could resist the impact of the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword.

Therefore, after Ye Tian entered the ninth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, he directly resisted the aura of the Sword Extreme Dao, of course, he could only stay in the outermost area, and if he went deeper, he wouldn't be able to last long.

But in this way, Ye Tian can hold on for a long time, and he doesn't need to condense and copy his body again and again, and the aura of cultivating the extreme path of the sword will naturally grow a lot.

Moreover, as he mastered more and more Sword Extreme Dao furs, he could naturally get closer to this super-perfect treasure, and the effect of his comprehension would naturally get better and better.

Before you know it, another 100,000 eternal years have passed.

And now, the effect of Ye Tian's 100,000 Eternal Years of Enlightenment far exceeded the effect of the previous hundreds of thousands of Eternal Years of Enlightenment.

"The progress is getting faster and faster, and the changes in Perfect Kendo have merged to 300 million changes. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, the Extreme Dao of the Sword he had mastered was about to condense into a rudimentary form.

Of course, at the very least, it is necessary to fuse the perfect kendo changes into 100 million variations, and then it can be called the prototype of the extreme path of the sword.

The eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

A replica body of Ye Tian came here, ready to compete with the nameless kun, that is, the nameless kun as a free sparring partner.

Ye Tian's cultivation realm is indeed inferior to the Nameless Kun, but now that he has mastered the fur of the Sword Extreme Dao, he is about to condense into a prototype, and his strength has risen greatly, so he naturally has the confidence to fight against the Nameless Kun.

Why cooperate with the Extreme Dao of the Sword, Ye Tian also specially created a Extreme Perfect Control Technique - Extreme Sword Dao Blade!

The Sword Dao Blade is a perfect control technique created by imitating the Ten Thousand Dao Blades, and the power is slightly worse, but after fusing the breath of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, the power of the Extreme Kendo Blade is extremely terrifying.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Nameless Kun, and fought with the Extreme Sword Dao Blade and the fur breath of the Sword Extreme Dao, and each blow pierced the Nameless Kun's body, causing damage to it.

Although the damage is very low, this means that Ye Tian is already qualified to fight with the Nameless Kun, and even has a certain upper hand.

And the nameless kun is now very difficult to hurt Ye Tian, if he continues to fight for a long time, the person who will win in the end must be Ye Tian.

"I didn't expect that after mastering the Extreme Dao of the Sword, my strength would already be comparable to that of a medium perfect master!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Seeing the power of the Sword Extreme Dao, Ye Tian was extremely eager to master the Sword Extreme Dao thoroughly, and he was also extremely eager for other Extreme Dao.

However, he only had the opportunity to comprehend the Extreme Path of the Sword now, but he could not comprehend other Extreme Paths, unless he found other super-perfect treasures, but that opportunity was too rare.

"Don't be greedy for now, let's master the extreme path of the sword first. This sword extremity alone will be enough for me to reach an incredible level among the perfect masters in the future. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Next, Ye Tian practiced hard again, and time passed slowly, and hundreds of thousands of eternal years passed unconsciously.

this day.

Ye Tian finally fused the thirty-three billion changes of the Perfect Sword Dao into one hundred million changes, triggering the transformation of the Perfect Sword Dao.

An incomparably sharp aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, and the pale golden light could shatter all matter.

This is the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword!

I saw Ye Tian casually point, and a light golden light combined with the Extreme Sword Dao Blade shattered time and space, spanning infinite distances, and bombarded the nameless kun.

Then, the nameless kun screamed in pain, and his injuries were not light, but he quickly recovered.

But this already means that Ye Tian can easily hurt the nameless kun, and his strength has surpassed the nameless kun, although he is not overpowering, but Ye Tian is also very satisfied.

"This is just the initial condensation of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and after a long time, the condensed Extreme Dao of the Sword Extreme Dao will become stronger and stronger, and the strength will become more and more terrifying!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, Ye Tian discovered a secret.

He found that the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword penetrated into the root of the body of the half-step perfect control of the Extreme Creation Realm, which could assist in impacting the Extreme Creation Chain, which was the conclusion reached by Ye Tian from an accidental experiment.

In other words, after he mastered the prototype of the Sword Pole Dao, it would be many times less difficult to break the chain of the Pole Creation in the future.

"If I had mastered the prototype of the Sword Extreme Dao earlier, those Extreme Creation Materials I had obtained before might be able to help me break five or six Extreme Creation Chains!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he was able to grasp the prototype of the Extreme Dao of the Sword by luck, which was already a stroke of luck, and he couldn't ask too much.

......

Ye Tian didn't clean up the creatures of the Nine Rivers Void, these creatures could intercept cultivators who tried to enter here for him, and they were a natural protective layer, and he also built his own dojo on the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, and he would sit here for a long time in the future.

One of his clones would stay here, while a clone of his will would sit in the Origin Sea.

After all, the Nine Rivers Void had a super-perfect treasure that was being conceived here, and it could also assist him in comprehending the Extreme Dao of the Sword, so he naturally had to attach great importance to it.

In this way, time passed, and the prototype of Ye Tian's Sword Extreme Dao became stronger and stronger.

this day.

Inside the Pathless Tower.

A piece of news spread among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm.

The golden mountain is about to open!

"Build a mountain of gold!"

Ye Tian naturally knew that this place was the dojo of the first half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm in the Ruins of Eternity, and once the Ruins of Eternity did not have the realm of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it was a peak half-step perfect controller who accidentally discovered the Extreme Creation Substance, and only then did he embark on the realm of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

And that one who had collected a large amount of Extreme Creation Materials, hoarded countless Extreme Creation Materials, and walked far, far away in the Extreme Creation Realm's half-step perfect control realm.

And the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm is called the Master of the Extreme.

And the Extreme Realm is also called by his name.

It's a pity that the Lord of the Extremes has fallen, and it was in an accident that otherwise, with the potential of the Masters of the Extremes, he is definitely one of the most terrifying of the Eternal Ruins today.

Although the master of the Pole Creation has fallen, the Extreme Creation Gold Mountain has remained, and there are still a lot of Extreme Creation Materials left on the Extreme Creation Gold Mountain, so it has also attracted many half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm.

And the Extreme Creation Golden Mountain only allows the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm to enter, and the perfect controller is not allowed to enter, no one dares to violate this rule, otherwise they will be sanctioned by some incomparably powerful existence.

"The Pole Gold Mountain is an opportunity, maybe I can get a lot of Pole Creation Materials, so as to break more Pole Creation Chains!"

Ye Tian muttered.
